list.name: origin
list.label: Origin country
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT origin_country FROM aircraft_state WHERE observed_at >= now() - interval '1 hour' ORDER BY 1

list.name: airline
list.label: Airline (callsign prefix)
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT substring(last_callsign, 1, 3) AS prefix FROM aircraft_state WHERE last_callsign IS NOT NULL AND length(trim(last_callsign)) >= 3 AND observed_at >= now() - interval '1 hour' ORDER BY 1

list.name: ground
list.label: On-ground state
list.query: All : .*, Airborne only : false, On ground only : true

panels.title: Active aircraft (last 5m)
panels.description: Count of aircraft_state rows whose latest observation is within the last 5 minutes, filtered by the dashboard variables.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS active FROM aircraft_state WHERE observed_at >= now() - interval '5 minutes' AND origin_country ~ '${origin:regex}' AND coalesce(substring(last_callsign,1,3),'') ~ '${airline:regex}' AND on_ground::text ~ '${ground:raw}'

panels.title: Airborne
panels.description: Aircraft matching the filters whose last observation said they're flying. Independent of the on-ground filter so the breakdown is always shown.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT on_ground) AS airborne FROM aircraft_state WHERE observed_at >= now() - interval '5 minutes' AND origin_country ~ '${origin:regex}' AND coalesce(substring(last_callsign,1,3),'') ~ '${airline:regex}'

panels.title: On ground
panels.description: Aircraft matching the filters that are currently on the ground. Independent of the on-ground filter so the breakdown is always shown.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE on_ground) AS on_ground FROM aircraft_state WHERE observed_at >= now() - interval '5 minutes' AND origin_country ~ '${origin:regex}' AND coalesce(substring(last_callsign,1,3),'') ~ '${airline:regex}'

panels.title: Avg cruise altitude (m)
panels.description: Mean barometric altitude of currently airborne aircraft matching the filters.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(avg(baro_altitude_m)::numeric, 0) AS avg_alt FROM aircraft_state WHERE NOT on_ground AND baro_altitude_m IS NOT NULL AND observed_at >= now() - interval '5 minutes' AND origin_country ~ '${origin:regex}' AND coalesce(substring(last_callsign,1,3),'') ~ '${airline:regex}'

panels.title: Top 10 origin countries (active last 5m)
panels.description: Country leaderboard of active aircraft. Reflects the airline + on-ground filters; origin filter is intentionally not applied so the panel can be used to discover countries to filter by.

targets.rawSql: SELECT origin_country, count(*)::int AS aircraft FROM aircraft_state WHERE observed_at >= now() - interval '5 minutes' AND coalesce(substring(last_callsign,1,3),'') ~ '${airline:regex}' AND on_ground::text ~ '${ground:raw}' GROUP BY origin_country ORDER BY aircraft DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Aircraft observed (last 1h, by minute)
panels.description: Distinct icao24 per minute over the last hour, filtered by the dashboard variables. Spikes correspond to OpenSky polls (every 300s).

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', observed_at) AS time, count(DISTINCT icao24) AS aircraft FROM flight_telemetry WHERE observed_at >= now() - interval '1 hour' AND origin_country ~ '${origin:regex}' AND coalesce(substring(callsign,1,3),'') ~ '${airline:regex}' AND on_ground::text ~ '${ground:raw}' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Recent emergency squawks (7500/7600/7700)
panels.description: Observations where the squawk code is one of three special emergency values: 7500 (hijack), 7600 (radio failure), 7700 (general emergency). Reflects origin + airline filters; on-ground filter is not applied — emergency squawks are surfaced regardless of state.

targets.rawSql: SELECT observed_at, icao24, callsign, origin_country, squawk, lat, lon, baro_altitude_m FROM flight_telemetry WHERE squawk IN ('7500','7600','7700') AND observed_at >= now() - interval '6 hours' AND origin_country ~ '${origin:regex}' AND coalesce(substring(callsign,1,3),'') ~ '${airline:regex}' ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 50
